name: Timothy Archer
background: Mr. Archer has been our President and Chief Executive Officer since December 2018. He joined Lam in 2012 in connection with the acquisition of Novellus Systems, Inc., where he served as Chief Operating Officer. He previously served as our President and Chief Operating Officer from January 2018 to December 2018 and as our Chief Operating Officer from June 2012 to January 2018.

companies.name: Lam Research Corporation
companies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
